title: saxifraga corsica var. mariolensis
intro: Saxifraga corsica var. mariolensis, a subspecies of Saxifraga corsica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is also known as Corsican saxifrage or Mariol's saxifrage, and is native to the island of Corsica. Traditionally, Saxifraga corsica var. mariolensis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
